entries.source_excerpt: Update commands/architect-team.md body so the model is explicitly told that the requirements folder path is known from the command context, and the orchestrator skill should bind $REQ_DIR to the path from command context and proceed with Phase −1.
acceptance_criteria: Invoking /architect-team:architect-team <path> begins Phase −1 against that path directly without re-prompting.
Invoking /architect-team:architect-team with no arg preserves the existing escape-clause (ask user, do nothing else).

entries.source_excerpt: Add a _safe_id helper in each hook script that rejects identifiers that contain /, \, leading ., or equal ... Call it on task_id (review-gate-task) and on subagent name (teammate-idle-check). On rejection: exit 2 with structured stderr.
acceptance_criteria: _safe_id present in both hook scripts; rejects empty, /, \, leading ., exact '..'.
Hook exits 2 with structured stderr when identifier rejected.

entries.source_excerpt: Add one test per missing branch (quality_review, reuse_compliance, demo_artifact empty, tests.added zero, malformed JSON, subagent_name flat payload). Total pytest count rises by 6+2 (combined with REQ-002 sanitization tests).
acceptance_criteria: ≥6 new tests in tests/test_review_gate_task.py covering quality_review, reuse_compliance, demo_artifact empty, tests.added=0, malformed JSON.
≥1 new test in tests/test_teammate_idle_check.py covering subagent_name flat payload.
Total pytest count rises from 54 to ≥60 (combined with REQ-002 tests, target is 62+).

entries.source_excerpt: Add a new ## Hook-rejection escalation policy section to skills/team-spawning-and-review-gates/SKILL.md mandating: after 3 consecutive hook rejections on the same task_id, the teammate MUST stop, write an escalation handoff, and wait for orchestrator clarification.
acceptance_criteria: ## Hook-rejection escalation policy section present in skills/team-spawning-and-review-gates/SKILL.md.
Section lists 3 mandatory steps with handoff path format.
Frontmatter description extended with 'and escalation policy on repeated hook rejection.'

entries.source_excerpt: Apply three corrections in-place to docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-16-architect-team-plugin-design.md: line 208 %ct→%cI; line 405 %ct→%cI; line 664 task_ids[]→expected_review_evidence list.
Bump version to 0.2.3, prepend CHANGELOG entry, commit with author override, tag v0.2.3, push main + tag.
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md has ## [0.2.3] section listing all REQs with affected files.
git ls-remote origin refs/tags/v0.2.3 returns a SHA.
